mapper.select: SELECT p.*, u.phone AS leader_phone FROM project p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.leader_id = u.id WHERE p.id = #{id} AND p.is_deleted = 0
SELECT p.*, u.phone AS leader_phone FROM project p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.leader_id = u.id WHERE p.leader_id = #{leaderId} AND p.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
SELECT p.*, u.phone AS leader_phone FROM project p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.leader_id = u.id WHERE p.team_id = #{teamId} AND p.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
SELECT p.*, u.phone AS leader_phone FROM project p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.leader_id = u.id WHERE p.status = #{status} AND p.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY p.create_time DESC

SELECT p.*, u.phone AS leader_phone FROM project p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.leader_id = u.id WHERE p.status = #{status} AND p.approval_status = #{approvalStatus} AND p.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
SELECT p.*, u.phone AS leader_phone FROM project p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.leader_id = u.id WHERE p.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
SELECT p.*, NULL AS leader_phone FROM project p WHERE p.leader_id IS NULL AND p.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project (title, description, category, leader_id, leader_name, instructor_name, team_id, status, approval_status, start_time, end_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{category}, #{leaderId}, #{leaderName}, #{instructorName}, #{teamId}, #{status}, #{approvalStatus}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE project SET previous_leader_id = NULL, previous_leader_name = NULL, previous_leader_phone = NULL WHERE id = #{id}
